sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23338" key="dalero/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δᾰλερός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ά</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n23338.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">burning, hot,</tr_> dub.l.in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:90:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">90.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
